name: eou-foundry
description: Recursive governance for Executable Operating Units (EOUs). Faceted classification, generating-EOU constraints, ECP-governed change, no-self-approval.

interface.shortDescription: Turn messy workflows into auditable, retirable Executable Operating Units with recursive governance
interface.longDescription: Install in any project that needs to turn messy workflows into auditable, retirable operating units. Generates candidate EOU sets from a workflow description, audits them for boundary quality and minimality, specifies approved candidates as formal EOUs with faceted classification (function + target + automation + authority + risk + lifecycle), proposes ECP-governed changes, and refactors or retires existing EOUs. Generating-EOU constraints prevent self-activation; no-self-approval keeps generation, auditing, and approval separable.
defaultPrompt: Generate candidate EOUs from this workflow description.
Audit the EOU at foundry/eous/<id>.yml for boundary, authority, and blast-radius issues.
Specify this approved candidate as a formal EOU.
Propose an ECP for changing this EOU's authority level.
